zh.lifeSummary: 當John Collins II於1524年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Roger Collins18歲，母親Mary Alice Ward35歲。他於1563年5月15日與Abigail Rose在英國素福爾可布拉福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年9月14日在英國素福爾可布拉福德享年70歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布拉福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Collins II于1524年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Roger Collins18岁，母亲Mary Alice Ward35岁。他于1563年5月15日与Abigail Rose在英国素福爾可布拉福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年9月14日在英国素福爾可布拉福德享年70岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布拉福德。

nameMeanings.name: Collins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Colin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish and Manx: shortened Anglicized from Ó Coileáin, compare Cullen , or in Man or west Ulster shortened from Mac Coileáin, compare McQuillan and McCallion . The genitival -s is a local addition to Collin and variants after the surname was Anglicized.
Americanized form of French   Colin   or   Collin   and also   Collette  .

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Kolenc
meanings: nickname from the dialect plant name kolenc ‘yellow bedstraw (Galium verum)’ or ‘common nipplewort (Lapsana communis)’. Compare Collins 3.

variants.name: Collings
meanings: English: variant of Collins or Colling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Collins II was born in 1524, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Collins, was 18 and his mother, Mary Alice Ward, was 35. He married Abigail Rose on 15 May 1563, in Bramford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 September 1594, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Bramford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Collins II est né en 1524, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Collins, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mary Alice Ward, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Abigail Rose le 15 mai 1563, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1594, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Collins II 1524 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Collins 18 und seine Mutter Mary Alice Ward 35. Er hat am 15. Mai 1563 in Bramford, Suffolk, England Abigail Rose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. September 1594 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bramford, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bramford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Collins II è nato il nel 1524 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Collins, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mary Alice Ward, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Abigail Rose il 15 maggio 1563, nel Bramford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 settembre 1594, nel Bramford, Suffolk, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Bramford, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Collins IIが1524年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Roger Collinsは18歳，母Mary Alice Wardは35歳であった。1563年5月15日にイギリススフォルクブラムフォードでAbigail Roseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年9月14日にイギリススフォルクブラムフォードで70歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブラムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Collins II(이)가 1524년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Collins(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Alice Ward(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1563년 5월 15일 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 Abigail Rose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 9월 14일 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Collins II nasceu em 1524, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Collins, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mary Alice Ward, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Abigail Rose em 15 de maio de 1563, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1594, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Collins II родился в 1524 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Collins было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Alice Ward, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Abigail Rose 15 мая 1563 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 сентября 1594 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Collins II nació en 1524, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Collins, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mary Alice Ward, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Abigail Rose el 15 de mayo de 1563, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1594, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
